description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features a mix of light gray concrete, beige stone, and large glass windows, creating a contemporary aesthetic. The front includes a covered entryway, a garage, and a landscaped area with shrubs and small trees. The rear of the house opens to a patio area surrounded by mature trees, providing privacy and a natural backdrop. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large panes facing the backyard for ample natural light. The overall structure is rectangular, with a prominent second-story volume set back from the main facade.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, stone and concrete exterior, large windows, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, and landscaped garden with shrubs and small trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, second-story volume, and the line of trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view with large glass windows, a patio area, and dense tree coverage providing privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the extended flat roof, stone facade, and the wraparound tree line.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a flat overhang, single modern door, adjacent garage, and landscaped steps
